checklist.test_strategy_covers_integration: N/A (leaf-node utility functions with no cross-module interactions; rationale documented in test-strategy.md)
checklist.test_strategy_covers_e2e: N/A (UX flow in isdlc.md is markdown instructions, not programmatic code; validated via manual acceptance testing in Phase 16)
checklist.test_strategy_covers_performance: N/A (timeouts enforced by execSync parameters; tested via mock error simulation in TC-SEARCH-03)

details.article_II: 13 unit tests designed before implementation (Phase 05 precedes Phase 06). Tests cover all 3 new functions: checkGhAvailability (3 tests), searchGitHubIssues (6 tests), createGitHubIssue (4 tests). Coverage targets: 100% line, branch, and function.
details.article_VII: Traceability matrix maps all 7 FRs and 32 ACs to either unit test cases (15 ACs) or manual validation in Phase 16 (17 ACs). No orphan tests. 100% requirement coverage.
details.article_IX: All 4 required artifacts produced: test-strategy.md, test-cases.md, test-traceability-matrix.csv, test-data-plan.md. All GATE-05 checklist items pass.
details.article_XI: No new cross-module interactions introduced. Functions are leaf-node utilities calling execSync. detectSource() is unchanged. Integration testing not required; rationale documented in test-strategy.md.

notes: GitHub issue reverse-lookup for free-text intake. 13 unit tests across 3 describe blocks covering checkGhAvailability(), searchGitHubIssues(), and createGitHubIssue(). All tests mock child_process.execSync using node:test mock API. Test data is entirely synthetic (no external fixtures). 17 UX-flow ACs deferred to manual acceptance testing in Phase 16 because they involve isdlc.md instruction blocks (not programmatic code). Extends existing test file test-three-verb-utils.test.cjs following established CJS/node:test patterns.
